feed.title: Bitly
feed.subtitle: Bitly updates: Blog, Press Room, and the Bitly MCP changelog.

entry.title: How I Turned Every Link Into a Branded, Trackable Asset (And You Can Too)
entry.content: Tech content creator Stephen Robles shares how Bitly helped him build a branded link system with custom domains, QR Codes, and analytics.

entry.title: Bitly vs V1CE: Which Digital Business Card Platform Fits Your Workflow?
entry.content: Bitly vs V1CE — compare features, pricing, and analytics to find the right digital business card platform. Get started with Bitly for free.

entry.title: Bitly vs Rb.gy: Which Link Shortener Fits Your Workflow?
entry.content: Compare Bitly and Rb.gy side by side on features, pricing, analytics, branding, and security to find the right link shortener. Get started with Bitly for free.

entry.title: The Marketer’s Guide to Owning Short Links and QR Codes
entry.content: Learn the importance of owning your short links and QR Codes, from redirect control to cleaner analytics, stronger trust, and fewer broken journeys.

entry.title: Which QR Code Metrics Actually Prove Campaign ROI?
entry.content: Use qr code campaign performance metrics to connect scans to conversions, revenue, and budget decisions—no more guesswork.

entry.title: Can Engagement Analytics Connect Offline and Online?
entry.content: See how customer engagement analytics unifies clicks and scans, closes attribution gaps, and gives you one view of intent across channels.

entry.title: What Are Good Link Performance Benchmarks by Channel?
entry.content: Use channel-specific link performance benchmarks to judge clicks, explain results, and make smarter budget and tracking decisions.

entry.title: QR Code Feedback Loops Work Best When Scans Stay Live
entry.content: Static vs. dynamic matters in QR Code feedback loops. Compare attribution, routing, and response workflows before you launch.

entry.title: What Do QR Codes Actually Do in the Customer Lifecycle?
entry.content: QR Codes aren't campaign accessories. See how customer lifecycle marketing with QR Codes turns every scan into a measurable, connected strategy.

entry.title: Why Short Links Belong in Customer Lifecycle Strategy
entry.content: Short links aren't campaign accessories. See how customer lifecycle marketing with short links builds attribution, trust, and visibility at every stage.

entry.title: A Practical Guide to QR Code Scan Tracking
entry.content: Learn how to track QR Code scans with dynamic codes, campaign tags, and clear analytics that connect offline engagement to revenue.

entry.title: Unique Clicks vs. Total Clicks: Which Shows Reach?
entry.content: Learn how unique clicks vs total clicks reveal reach, engagement, and channel issues so you can trust your reporting and act faster in Bitly.

entry.title: How Do Editable Links Prevent Dead Links After Launch?
entry.content: See how editable links prevent dead links, protect QR Codes and partner placements, and keep attribution intact when destinations change.

entry.title: Top Free Link Shorteners Compared (2026)
entry.content: Compare the top free link shortener plans for 2026. See features, limits, and trade-offs for Bitly, Dub, Rebrandly, and Short.io side by side.

entry.title: 50+ Social Media Engagement Questions To Ask Your Audience
entry.content: Boost your social media presence with 50+ engagement questions across 15 categories. Get ready-to-use questions for Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, and TikTok.

entry.title: Best TinyURL Alternatives To Consider in 2026 (+ How To Choose the Best One)
entry.content: Compare the best TinyURL alternatives for 2026. See features, pricing, and trade-offs for Bitly, Rebrandly, Dub, Short.io, and more URL shorteners.

entry.title: How to Use QR Codes for Gift Registries (2026)
entry.content: Learn how to create and share QR Codes for wedding, baby, and gift registries. Step-by-step guide plus tips for invitations, social media, and in-store use.

entry.title: Why A/B Testing Short Links Beats One-Size URLs
entry.content: See how A/B testing short links helps you compare offers, measure downstream engagement, and avoid false wins with stronger measurement.

entry.title: How Do Luxury Brands Measure Customer Lifecycle Attribution?
entry.content: Compare models, connect QR scans and links, and make customer lifecycle attribution for luxury retail reflect real buyer journeys.

entry.title: How Healthcare Can Overcome Patient Engagement Challenges: A Guide
entry.content: Get a clear framework for overcoming customer engagement challenges in healthcare. Compare SMS, QR codes, short links, and analytics in this guide.

entry.title: A Telecom Marketer’s Guide to Reducing Churn Without Discounts
entry.content: We provide a practical framework for telecom customer engagement challenges. Spot early churn signals, fix handoffs, and measure every channel with confidence.

entry.title: How to Know Which Marketing Channel Is Actually Driving Conversions
entry.content: Still guessing which platform converts? Sophie of Pretty Little Marketer shares how she uses Bitly to make the customer journey visible.

entry.title: Best URL Shortener APIs for Developers (2026)
entry.content: Compare the top URL shortener APIs for 2026. See features, pricing, rate limits, and code examples for Bitly, Short.io, Rebrandly, Dub, and more.

entry.title: How To Calculate Social Media ROI: A Practical Guide for 2026
entry.content: Learn how to calculate social media ROI with formulas, real examples, and the metrics that matter. A step-by-step guide for marketers in 2026.

entry.title: How to Use QR Codes for RSVPs the Right Way
entry.content: Learn how to create QR Code RSVPs for weddings, corporate events, and parties. Get step-by-step instructions, placement tips, and tracking advice.

entry.title: What Should a QR Code Performance Dashboard Show?
entry.content: See how a QR Code performance dashboard helps you track scans, trends, regions, and devices, so you can prove impact and act faster.

entry.title: Pros and Cons of QR Code Advertising: What Marketers Should Know in 2026
entry.content: Explore the pros and cons of using QR Codes in ads. Learn when they work, their limits, and best practices for QR Code advertising in 2026.

entry.title: How to Automate Short Links with the Bitly and Zapier Integration
entry.content: Automate link creation with Bitly and Zapier. Build no-code workflows for social, CRM, and spreadsheets—ideal for high-volume enterprise use.

entry.title: QR Engagement Metrics That Prove What’s Working Over Time
entry.content: Learn which QR engagement metrics matter most, how to spot trends, and how to use timing and location insights to optimize future campaigns.

entry.title: Print Marketing Metrics: You Can Track ROI Without New Tools
entry.content: Track print marketing metrics with QR Codes and short links that pass UTM data into analytics, so you can prove ROI without new tools.

entry.title: What Social Click Analytics Reveal That Email UTMs Can’t
entry.content: Learn what email UTMs miss, and how social short link analytics reveal the why behind clicks, timing, and regional ROI.

entry.title: The Friction Principle: QR Codes Impact Customer Acquisition
entry.content: Learn how QR Codes reduce friction, connect offline to online journeys, and create measurable acquisition funnels you can optimize with Bitly.

entry.title: It’s True That Direct Mail Tracking Is Surging (Here’s Why)
entry.content: Direct mail tracking is surging, learn how QR scan data reveals where and when to mail, cut waste, and improve ROI with real-time insights.

entry.title: Test Job Posts Fast With Short Link Analytics
entry.content: Use short link analytics to spot click-to-application gaps, attribute channels, and uncover talent markets before you scale job ads.

entry.title: Added a tool to retrieve a group's preferences, including its default domain for link creation.
entry.content: Added a tool to retrieve a group's preferences, including its default domain for link creation.

entry.title: The Best AI Prompts for Link and QR Code Management: 40+ Ideas to Get Started
entry.content: Copy and paste 40+ ready-to-use AI prompts for link and QR Code management. Create short links, track campaigns, and uncover insights now.

entry.title: Added tools for time-series and summary engagement metrics on a single link.
entry.content: Added tools for time-series and summary engagement metrics on a single link.

entry.title: Added tools to bulk-create short links and QR Codes from a .CSV or .XLSX file. Updated short link creation ...
entry.content: Added tools to bulk-create short links and QR Codes from a .CSV or .XLSX file. Updated short link creation to support custom back-halves on new and existing links.

entry.title: Added OAuth 2.1 with Dynamic Client Registration (DCR) for secure authentication. All MCP endpoints now req...
entry.content: Added OAuth 2.1 with Dynamic Client Registration (DCR) for secure authentication. All MCP endpoints now require authentication. Added QR Code appearance customization (foreground/background colors, gradients, frame, pips) to QR Code creation and update.

entry.title: Added six QR Code scan metrics tools for analyzing QR Code performance.
entry.content: Added six QR Code scan metrics tools for analyzing QR Code performance.

entry.title: Initial release of the Bitly MCP Server with core link management, analytics, and QR Code tools.
entry.content: Initial release of the Bitly MCP Server with core link management, analytics, and QR Code tools.
